personas.title: Market Personas
personas.subtitle: Winly AI uses behavioral clustering to classify every buyer and competitor into specific "Personas." Understanding who you are dealing with is the first step to winning.
personas.buyersSubtitle: Classified by spending habits, openness, and price sensitivity.
personas.competitorsSubtitle: Classified by win volume, market reach, and specialization.

openInnovator.name: The Open Innovator
openInnovator.desc: Public entities that actively seek new vendors. They rarely award to the same company twice consecutively.

loyalist.name: The Loyalist
loyalist.desc: Risk-averse buyers who stick to what they know. The top winner often captures >50% of their contracts.

priceHawk.name: The Aggressive Discounter
priceHawk.desc: Budget-constrained entities that prioritize cost above all. They consistently award at massive discounts (-40% to -60%).

highValueHawk.name: The High-Value Hawk
highValueHawk.desc: Buyers of large-scale infrastructure or complex systems. They spend big but demand significant efficiency savings.

consistentStandard.name: The Consistent Standard
consistentStandard.desc: The "Bread and Butter" of the public sector. Predictable spending, standard discounts (-10%), and fair rotation.

nationalDominator.name: The National Dominator
nationalDominator.desc: Market giants with massive reach. They bid on everything, everywhere, and have the capacity to deliver at scale.

nicheSpecialist.name: The Niche Specialist
nicheSpecialist.desc: Highly technical firms that don't bid often, but when they do, they win big. Focused on specific high-value sectors.

localKing.name: The Local King
localKing.desc: Smaller firms that dominate a specific municipality. They have 100% client dependency and rarely venture outside their district.

risingStar.name: The Rising Star
risingStar.desc: Successful SMEs that are rapidly expanding their client base. They have broken out of "Local" status and are scaling up.

about.heroSubtitle: We believe that every business, regardless of size, deserves a fair shot at government contracts. Winly AI levels the playing field with enterprise-grade intelligence.
about.missionDesc1: The EU public procurement market is worth over €2 trillion annually, yet it remains opaque and difficult to navigate for many SMEs. Complex documentation, fragmented data sources, and lack of competitive visibility create high barriers to entry.
about.missionDesc2: Winly AI was founded to solve this information asymmetry. By combining data from TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) and national portals like BASE (Portugal) with advanced AI, we provide the clarity businesses need to bid with confidence.
about.transparencyDesc: Making government spending data accessible and actionable.
about.excellenceDesc: Helping high-quality suppliers win based on merit.
about.communityDesc: Building a network of trusted EU suppliers.
about.teamDesc: Our team combines deep expertise in public administration, data science, and enterprise software development.
about.heroSubtitle2: We believe every business — regardless of size — deserves a fair shot at government contracts. Winly AI levels the playing field with enterprise-grade procurement intelligence, built from the ground up for European SMEs.
about.problemTitle: Public procurement is opaque — and unfair
about.problemDesc1: The EU public procurement market is worth over €2 trillion annually. Yet for most SMEs, it remains impossibly hard to navigate: complex documentation, fragmented data spread across dozens of national portals, and no visibility into what competitors are doing or what buyers actually want.
about.problemDesc2: Large firms have dedicated bid management teams, market analysts, and institutional relationships. A 10-person consultancy has a spreadsheet and a prayer. Winly AI was built to close that gap — giving SMEs the same strategic intelligence that was previously only available to enterprise bid teams.
about.ps2Label: New tender notices published per year across EU portals
about.ps3Label: Of tenders go unnoticed by most eligible SMEs
about.ps4Label: Win rate improvement for data-driven bidders
about.solutionSubtitle: We combine real procurement data with AI to give you intelligence that used to require a whole analyst team.
about.s1Desc: Every tender is scored across 6 dimensions — CPV sector match, geographic relevance, capacity fit, semantic keyword alignment, buyer openness, and market opportunity — not just keyword presence.
about.s2Desc: We aggregate and normalize tender data from TED (Tenders Electronic Daily, covering 30+ EU countries) and BASE (Portugal's public contracts portal). New tenders sync daily.
about.s3Desc: We calculate your win probability per tender based on your company's historical performance, the buyer's award patterns, and the competitive density for that sector and value range.
about.s4Desc: Using Google Gemini 2.5 Flash, we download and analyze the actual tender procurement package — extracting risk scores, financial criteria, timeline constraints, incumbent alerts, and strategic flags.
about.s5Desc: We profile every public authority and every active competitor: total spend, avg discount, top suppliers, sector focus, behavioral persona — so you walk into every bid knowing exactly who you're dealing with.
about.s6Desc: We analyze historical award values for the buyer and sector to give you data-driven price recommendations — P25 (aggressive), P50 (median), P75 (high margin) — so you optimize win rate vs. margin.
about.dataSubtitle: Real procurement data. No scraped summaries. No stale databases.
about.tedB5: New tenders synced daily at publication
about.baseB2: Contract award records with final values
about.baseB3: Winner and competitor data per contract
about.baseB4: Buyer spending history going back 10+ years
about.baseB5: Direct award and competitive procedure mix
about.v1Desc: Matching opportunities with 98% relevance accuracy. We never surface irrelevant noise — only tenders that genuinely fit your profile.
about.v2Desc: Government spending data should be accessible and actionable for everyone — not just large firms with dedicated research teams.
about.v3Desc: We help high-quality suppliers win based on merit, not institutional advantage. Better suppliers winning means better public services.
about.v4Desc: Bid teams move fast. Winly surfaces insights in seconds — not hours. AI document analysis in 30 seconds, not 3 days of manual review.
about.teamTitle2: Built by experts in procurement & AI
about.teamDesc2: Our team combines deep expertise in public administration, data engineering, and enterprise AI. We've spent years studying procurement patterns, building ETL pipelines on BigQuery, and developing the multi-agent AI architecture that powers Winly's document intelligence.
about.teamDesc3: The platform is built on Google Cloud (BigQuery + Cloud Run), uses Google Gemini 2.5 Flash for document analysis, and processes data from TED and BASE through a daily automated pipeline — ensuring you always have up-to-date intelligence.

landing.heroSubtitle: The only intelligence platform combining TED & BASE data with a 150-point AI scoring system. Predict win probabilities, analyze competitors, and extract strategic intelligence from tender documents — automatically.
landing.heroTrust: No credit card required · 14-day free trial · Cancel anytime
landing.showcaseTitle: Everything your bid team needs, in one platform
landing.showcaseSubtitle: From finding the right tenders to understanding exactly how to win them — see what Professional subscribers get.
landing.screen1Desc: Every tender in your matches list gets a detailed intelligence report. See exactly why you scored 94 points — CPV alignment, geographic relevance, capacity fit, semantic keyword match — and your calculated win probability against this specific buyer.
landing.screen1b1: Score broken down across 6 dimensions (not just a single number)
landing.screen1b2: Win probability calculated from buyer history + your profile
landing.screen1b3: Price recommendation with P25 / P50 / P75 historical ranges
landing.screen1b4: Incumbent detection — know if you're challenging a sitting supplier
landing.screen1b5: Expected competitors ranked by historical wins with this buyer
landing.screen2Desc: Click "Analyze Documents" on any active tender and Winly downloads the procurement package, extracts every relevant detail using Gemini 2.5 Flash, and presents a structured intelligence report — so you never miss a hidden requirement or risk clause again.
landing.screen2b1: Risk score (0–10) with key risk factors extracted from the actual document
landing.screen2b2: Financials: exact budget, price vs. quality weighting, required guarantees
landing.screen2b3: Timeline: submission deadline, clarification windows, contract duration
landing.screen2b4: Strategic flags: incumbent vendors, proprietary lock-ins, advance payment rules
landing.screen2b5: Export as branded PDF or generate strategic clarification questions
landing.intelSubtitle: Before you bid, know exactly who you're bidding to and who you're bidding against. Winly profiles every public authority and every active competitor in the market.
landing.intelBuyerDesc: See total spend, avg bidders, top winning suppliers, and behavioral persona classification for any public authority.
landing.intelCompDesc: Track any competitor's win rate, sector specialization, average discount, and threat level — with persona classification.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Most platforms just send keyword alerts. Winly gives you the strategic intelligence to actually win.
landing.f1Desc: Our 150-point algorithm scores tenders across geographic feasibility, buyer openness, CPV alignment, semantic keyword matching, and historical performance — not just keyword presence.
landing.f2Desc: Complete coverage of TED (30+ EU countries) and BASE (Portugal). New tenders are synced daily and scored against your profile within hours of publication.
landing.f3Desc: Don't bid blindly. See your calculated win probability based on this buyer's award history, your sector fit, and the competition density for similar tenders.
landing.f4Desc: Identify incumbents and their pricing patterns. Track national dominators, niche specialists, and rising stars before they show up in the award results against you.
landing.f5Desc: Maximize margins without losing bids. Get data-driven price bands (P25 / P50 / P75) derived from actual historical award values for this buyer and sector.
landing.f6Desc: Automatically download and analyze the tender procurement package. Extract risk scores, financial criteria, timeline constraints, and strategic flags in under 30 seconds.
landing.f7Desc: Every public authority profiled: total spend, avg discount, top suppliers, sector focus, and behavioral persona (Open Innovator, Loyalist, Aggressive Discounter…).
landing.f8Desc: Each AI analysis includes a 0–10 risk score and extracted key risk factors: proprietary lock-ins, tight clarification windows, aggressive SLAs, and incumbent strength signals.
landing.f9Desc: Ask questions about any analyzed tender in natural language. Grounded in the actual procurement document.
landing.howSubtitle: No integration required. No data export. Works with your existing workflow.
landing.step1Desc: Enter your services, CPV codes, target budget range, and geographic focus. Optionally enter your VAT ID to auto-import historical win data and calibrate your win probability model.
landing.step2Desc: The V3 engine scores every new tender on TED and BASE against your profile using 150 data points. You receive only relevant matches — not keyword noise — sorted by match score.
landing.step3Desc: For each opportunity: analyze the buyer's history, check competitor threats, get a price recommendation, and run AI document analysis on the procurement package — all in one tab.
landing.personasDesc1: Winly AI fingerprints the behavioral DNA of every buyer and competitor in the EU procurement market — classifying them into strategic personas so you can predict their next move.
landing.personasDesc2: Is this buyer a Loyalist (top supplier wins 60%+ of contracts)? Or an Open Innovator (actively diversifying)? Is that competitor a National Dominator or a vulnerable Local King? Knowing this changes your strategy entirely.
landing.personasCard1Desc: 5 buyer personas classified by spending habit, openness to new vendors, and price sensitivity — from The Loyalist to The Open Innovator.
landing.personasCard2Desc: 4 competitor personas classified by win volume, market reach, and sector specialization — from The National Dominator to The Rising Star.
landing.personasCard3Desc: Our engine predicts which specific competitors are likely to bid on a tender before they even submit, based on behavioral patterns.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your ambition. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
landing.starterDesc: For freelancers & micro-businesses starting with public procurement.
landing.sf4: Daily email digest of new matches
landing.proDesc: For SMEs who need a competitive edge and full strategic intelligence.
landing.entDesc: For consortiums, bid management teams, and mid-size firms with high pipeline volume.
landing.faq1q: How does the 150-point scoring algorithm work?
landing.faq1a: Each tender is scored across six dimensions: CPV sector match (how closely your services align with the procurement category), geographic relevance (your region vs. the buyer's location), capacity fit (whether your budget range matches the contract value), keyword semantic match (AI analysis of your service description against tender requirements), buyer openness (historical tendency to award to new vendors), and market opportunity (competition level and strategic timing). The sum is normalized to a 0–100 match score.
landing.faq2q: What data sources does Winly use?
landing.faq2a: Winly aggregates from TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) — the official EU procurement journal covering 30+ European countries — and BASE (Portuguese Public Contracts Portal), which publishes all Portuguese public contracts. New tenders are synchronized daily and processed through our AI pipeline within hours of publication.
landing.faq3q: What is included in the AI Document Analysis?
landing.faq3a: The AI Document Analysis (Pro/Enterprise) downloads the actual tender documents, extracts and organizes all key information using Google Gemini 2.5 Flash, and produces a structured report covering: project summary, budget and evaluation criteria (price vs. quality weights), submission timeline, mandatory certifications, strategic intelligence (incumbent vendors, lock-in risks, advance payment clauses), and a 0–10 risk assessment. You can also export the report as a branded PDF or generate strategic clarification questions.
landing.faq4q: How accurate is the win probability?
landing.faq4a: Win probability is calculated from your historical performance (if available via VAT ID), the buyer's award patterns for your sector (how often they switch suppliers, their average discount), the competition density (average number of bidders), and your match score. It is a data-driven estimate — not a guarantee — based on patterns observed across 100,000+ past awards. Use it as a prioritization signal, not an absolute prediction.
landing.faq5q: Can I use Winly for TED (EU-wide) tenders, or only Portuguese ones?
landing.faq5a: Both. Winly covers TED tenders from across the EU (30+ countries) and BASE tenders from Portugal. Your matching engine can be configured for any geography via your company profile — set your target regions, CPV codes, and budget range to receive relevant matches regardless of country.
landing.faq6q: Is there a free trial and what does it include?
landing.faq6a: Yes — all plans start with a 14-day free trial, no credit card required. During the trial you have full access to the plan features you selected. The free/explorer tier (no subscription) gives you access to the Tender Explorer search tool and basic match cards without scores or intelligence features.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to win your next public contract?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join bid teams across Europe who use Winly to find better opportunities, understand their competition, and bid with confidence. First 14 days free — no credit card required.
